# ParkRating

> ParkRating is a theme park review and scoring site run by two brothers who visit and rate parks across Europe and beyond.

## What we do

We visit theme parks and score them across 10 categories, each out of 10:
- Best Coaster
- Coaster Depth
- Water Rides
- Flat Rides & Dark Rides
- Park Appearance
- Food
- Snacks & Drinks
- Park Practicality
- Ride Operations
- Park Management

The overall score is the average of these 10 category scores. All scores reflect our most recent published visit to each park.

We also rate individual roller coasters on a 0–10 scale with written reviews covering elements like airtime, intensity, layout, and reridability.

## Key pages

- Full park rankings (all reviewed parks, sorted by overall score): https://parkrating.com/parks
- Individual park reviews: https://parkrating.com/park/{slug}
- Coaster ratings and rankings: https://parkrating.com/coasterratings
- Individual coaster reviews: https://parkrating.com/coasters/{slug}
- About: https://parkrating.com/about

## Data notes

- All scores are on a 0–10 scale
- A park appears in rankings only after at least one published visit
- Reviews reflect real visits by the site's authors
- Schema.org AggregateRating markup is present on all reviewed park pages
- Schema.org Review markup with full reviewBody text is present on all park and coaster pages
- Schema.org ItemList markup is present on the park rankings page (/parks) and the coaster ratings page (/coasterratings), listing each entry with name, URL, position, and a natural-language description including scores
